Subject: Re: Update
Message:
Jeff-
I was going through my emails when I came across one from you to
which I never responded. A few days after you asked if I was working
with anthrax, I was whisked to DCv on a charter flight to assist with
the investigation there.
It was an amazing and intense experience during which I learned a
tremendous amount. It was very different being a part of a team, as
opposed to directing an investigation. I unfortunately did not have
much time to explore DC, although we were staying in a very nice part
of Dupont Circle. I am happy to be back in Atlanta (where I have been
for only 3 weeks since July). I still have quite a bit of work to
complete related to the investigation before letting the rest of the
team make their advice, suggestions, and contributions.
How have you been? I read briefly that Enron was having some tough
times. Did this affect you directly, or were the happenings in
another division?
Are you going back to Louisville for
